question: What was the Brazilian Expeditionary Force?

options.A: A naval blockade of South America
options.B: About 25,000 Brazilian troops who fought in the Italian Campaign (1944-45)
options.C: A group of Brazilian diplomats at the UN
options.D: A Brazilian air force unit stationed in Britain

explanation: Brazil was the only Latin American nation to send combat troops to Europe, fighting in Italy under Allied command.
